value.found_quote: `data_source_config`: A schema for the test data you will use along with the eval.
value.rationale: The page describes data_source_config as a key parameter for creating evals via the OpenAI Evals API, with multiple code examples. However, the page states OpenAI is deprecating the Evals platform (read-only Oct 31, 2026; shutdown Nov 30, 2026), so the broader feature is deprecated, though it still works during the transition.
